name: auto-workflow
description: Automate development workflow: specs → stories → issues → GitHub → implementation

plugins.name: cc-auto-workflow
plugins.description: Auto workflow: specs → stories → approved issues → GitHub → implementation (Rails/Flutter support)

commands.name: sync-github-issues
commands.description: Sync local issue files to GitHub Issues

commands.name: implement-issue
commands.description: Implement a feature from a GitHub Issue

commands.name: review-specs
commands.description: Review specification for completeness and clarity

commands.name: review-code
commands.description: Review code against project rules and standards

setup.instructions: Run 'bash setup.sh' to initialize your project

notes: Core workflow (issues, GitHub sync, implementation) is functional. Advanced skills (e.g., code review) are planned for future releases.
